config.note: TTA'd ensemble: per scan, each of 9 tiles is augmented with the 8 elements of D4 (identity, 3 rotations, 4 flipped rotations). All 72 PIL images are encoded and mean-pooled to a single scan embedding, which is then standardized and classified. The caller MUST expand tiles via the D4 orbit before calling predict_proba_from_tiles; see scripts/tta_experiment.py::d4_augmentations. Honest person-LOPO raw-argmax weighted F1 = 0.6458 (+0.0112 over non-TTA 0.6346 baseline).
